## Implementation Complete

**Scope:** Added two plan execution reference files to `.developing-skills/refactored-skills/use-hivemind-planning/references/`

**Files Modified:**
- `references/plan-execution.md` — Plan execution flow, stop/ask/revisit rules, and guardrails
- `references/plan-to-delegation.md` — Plan-to-delegation mapping, phase numbering scheme, task extraction method, and parallel dispatch criteria

Both files now sit alongside the existing references (`plan-lifecycle.md`, `phase-numbering.md`, `dependency-ordering.md`, etc.). The reference collection covers the full lifecycle: plan creation → task extraction → delegation → execution → verification.
